title: Java Edition Panorama
description: One thing that I love more than good looking block textures? Good looking panoramas. And to my eye, the promotional graphics for Java are WAY nicer looking than classic per-version ones. So why not upgrade them?
body:
# Make Java Panoramas Great Again!
One thing that I love more than good looking block textures? Good looking panoramas. 

And to my eye, the promotional graphics for Java are WAY nicer looking than classic per-version ones. So why not upgrade them?

![Java Edition Panorama](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/eed8ab5840683fc990abc16961a0785b90561dfd.webp)

# Features
- Single panorama, directly ported from Java promotional materials

# Not your cup of tea?
Feel free to check out [other panoramas](https://modrinth.com/user/Lumora) that I made for you!
